comments.text: Oracle-guided continuation completed. Implemented both recommended low-risk extractions: (1) shared wall callouts moved to core in packages/core/src/wall/ui/status-callouts.ts and consumed by both hosts; (2) shared wall route composition extracted to packages/core/src/runtime/onboarding-wall-route.ts via createOnboardingWallRouteView, with web/desktop host runtimes now delegating wall UI composition and retaining only platform hooks (fullscreen/history on web, tauri/platform/vault on desktop).
